notes: Model-B validation deploy — same source lineage as mainnet 0x8b2412e9, published the same day.
publishedBy is omitted on purpose: the publish tx is pruned from public testnet RPCs, so the sender could not be verified on-chain. publishedAt comes from the deploy commit.
Still at version 1 — the cap setters (set_max_per_tx / set_budget / set_window_budget) shipped in mainnet v2 and are NOT here yet.
The official testnet RPC has been unreliable — use https://sui-testnet-rpc.publicnode.com or https://rpc-testnet.suiscan.xyz.

superseded.reason: Early policy-only package, before the multi-module (model-B) rework.
